allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: resolve TypeScript errors in guest checkin endpoint

- Use qrCode instead of non-existent roomId field on Room model
- Use room.id for Guest relation instead of raw string
- Add missing hotelId to Guest.create
- Replace non-existent Room fields \(status, guestName, checkIn, checkOut\) with isOccupied

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: remove token/name from QR codes - keep QR codes permanent

- Remove duplicate /api/guests/checkin endpoint that was overwriting qrCode with guest name
- Remove generate-guest-qr endpoint that mutated qrCode
- Stop checkout from modifying qrCode \(only update isOccupied\)
- Remove token generation from checkin response \(QR codes are permanent\)
- Send checkOut date from frontend API route to backend

QR codes now stay as fixed room-{number} format and never change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: kitchen panel now shows guest name and occupied status correctly

- Map backend room data \(isOccupied, guests[]\) to frontend RoomStatus format
  \(status: occupied/vacant, guestName\) in ApiService.getRooms
- Add checkOut to guest select in /api/rooms endpoint
- Kitchen panel now correctly shows guest names and occupied rooms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
